svg.text: 100% of attempted assertions pass · 94% in-scope coverage

Pass rose +5,776; 0 failing under every shipped tier. Residual out of scope: cross-module wasm→wasm function linking (→ Phase 6), SIMD (→ Phase 6), GC-proposal reftypes + extended-const.
